Avian Influenza.severity_reason: High mortality rate and severe respiratory failure.
Avian Influenza.exposure_reason: Requires direct contact with infected birds or poultry.

Hepatitis E.severity_reason: Acute liver inflammation; especially dangerous during pregnancy.
Hepatitis E.exposure_reason: Ingestion of contaminated water or undercooked food.

Leptospirosis.severity_reason: May cause kidney failure, meningitis, or liver damage.
Leptospirosis.exposure_reason: Skin contact  with water contaminated by animal urine.

Measles.severity_reason: High risk of pneumonia, encephalitis, and hospitalization.
Measles.exposure_reason: Highly contagious via respiratory droplets in crowded areas.

Myiasis.severity_reason: Larval infestation of tissue causing pain and inflammation.
Myiasis.exposure_reason: Contact with fly larvae in soil or clothing.
